title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an open-weight coding model available via Big Pickle, a free stealth model within OpenCode that offers approximately 200 free requests per five-hour window. It demonstrates fast token speeds and low latency, supporting real coding tasks including repo exploration, bug fixes, refactoring, and feature development.
writeup: The video covers GLM-5.2, an open-weight coding model accessed through Big Pickle, a free stealth model inside OpenCode that provides roughly 200 free requests per five-hour window. It demonstrates the model on real coding tasks: repo exploration, bug fixes, refactoring, and feature development. The emphasis falls on fast token speeds and low latency during these runs. The takeaway is a free, open-weight path to a capable coding model without paid API access.
